title: Social Workers' Experiences of Cooperation Between Disability Services and Child Protection Aftercare 2023-2024
description: A qualitative survey of social workers was carried out to find out their experiences of cooperation between social workers in disability services and child protection aftercare. The survey was intended for licensed and substitute social workers who have had clients who are young adults with both disability services and aftercare services.
